title: APM UX Refinements from live-integration-testing findings

stories.title: Catch-all 404 route prevents Phoenix crash on unknown paths
stories.acceptance: GET /jobs (and any unknown path) returns clean 404 NotFound, no Phoenix error page

stories.title: Consistent empty-state components on /plugins tabs
stories.acceptance: All 4 tabs (MCP/Discovered/Engine/Claude Code) render an icon + message + CTA when empty instead of one-line text

stories.title: Session Timeline hides empty swim lanes
stories.acceptance: Swim lanes with 0 events are collapsed behind a Show empty lanes toggle

stories.title: Session list group-by-date option
stories.acceptance: Session list offers Date grouping (Today/Yesterday/Last 7 days/Older); detail metadata in 2-col grid

stories.title: Usage dashboard zero-value empty state
stories.acceptance: Model Breakdown hides rows with all-zero totals and shows empty-state with sync hint when nothing has been recorded

stories.title: Docs sidebar shows category context to disambiguate duplicate titles
stories.acceptance: TOC entries with duplicate titles across categories are visually distinguishable
